chunks.text: ORDER SHEET THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH CIRCUIT COURT AT LARKANA Crl.Transfer.Appln.No.S-63 of 2018 Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on office objection “A” 2. For hearing of case..-.-.-.-. 22.10.2018 Mr.Muhammad Afzal Jagirani, Advocate for the applicant. Mr. Raja Imtiaz Ali Solangi, A.P.G..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-. The applicant by way of instant transfer application has sought for transfer of his case from the Court of learned Sessions Judge, Shikarpur, to any other Court. It is stated by learned counsel for the private respondents that the case at present is now pending trial before the Court of learned 3rd Additional Sessions Judge, Shikarpur, and it has proceeded there. Learned counsel for the applicant being faced with the above situation does not press the instant transfer application for the time being, it is disposed of accordingly. J U D G E..
